visual_description: A heavyset man in a patterned short‑sleeve shirt leans over a table holding a pen while a younger man in a black leather jacket sits opposite him, listening closely; a third person smokes in the background near a chalkboard covered in writing.
audio_description: The two men converse quietly, with the man in the patterned shirt speaking while the other listens, producing low murmuring speech.
